story.text:
# ✨ Bless Covenant
**🤲(blessing) → 📜(article) → 🌿(covenant)**
*manifestia · temple · V55*

Bless a covenant article. The blessing is the Priest's tending; the article is what the Mages forged.

> The Covenant blesses what the architecture admits. The Priest tends what the Mages forge.

*Keywords:* bless · covenant · priest · v55 · human-tech
